tasks.subject: Task 1: Singapore Timezone Removal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove hardcoded `Asia/Singapore` timezone from all four scaffold Dockerfiles so containers default to UTC.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md` (lines 174–176)
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md` (lines 310–313, 364–365)
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md` (lines 184–187, 258, 261–262)
- Modify: `skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md` (lines 253–256)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No `Asia/Singapore` remains in any skill file
- [ ] `tzdata` removed from apt/apk install in all four scaffolds
- [ ] COPY lines for `/etc/localtime` and `/etc/timezone` removed from nextjs-scaffold and nestjs-scaffold final stages
- [ ] Each scaffold has a `# TZ defaults to UTC` comment

**Verify:** `grep "Asia/Singapore" skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"Asia/Singapore\" skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No Asia/Singapore in any skill file", "tzdata removed from apt/apk in all four scaffolds", "COPY localtime/timezone lines removed from nextjs and nestjs final stages", "Each scaffold has TZ defaults to UTC comment"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Model Snapshot Version Pin
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the literal `gpt-4o-2024-11-20` model snapshot in `shared-add-ai-security` with a placeholder-annotated example that preserves the teaching point without encoding a drifting date.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md` (lines 132–136, 264–265)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No `gpt-4o-2024-11-20` remains in the file
- [ ] LLM03 bad example updated from `'gpt-4'` to `'gpt-4o'`
- [ ] Both occurrences replaced with `gpt-4o-2024-08-06` annotated `// example only — use your provider's current snapshot`

**Verify:** `grep "2024-11-20" skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"2024-11-20\" skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No gpt-4o-2024-11-20 in file", "LLM03 bad example uses gpt-4o (bare alias)", "Both occurrences use gpt-4o-2024-08-06 with example only annotation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: better-auth Version Markers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove `better-auth ≥1.6` and `better-auth 1.6` version markers from `nextjs-add-auth` while preserving the behavioral notes they prefix.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` (lines 138, 509)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Line 138 no longer contains `better-auth ≥1.6`
- [ ] Line 509 no longer contains `better-auth 1.6`
- [ ] Both behavioral facts retained

**Verify:** `grep "better-auth.*[0-9]\+\.[0-9]" skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"better-auth.*[0-9]\\+\\.[0-9]\" skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No better-auth version markers remain", "freshAge measured from createdAt note retained", "oidc-provider removed note retained"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: python-json-logger v4 Compatibility
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace `python-json-logger>=3.3.0,<4.0` with `python-json-logger>=4.0` in all four occurrences across two files.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md` (lines 26, 124, 1699)
- Modify: `skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md` (line 298)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All four occurrences updated to `python-json-logger>=4.0`
- [ ] No `<4.0` remains in either file

**Verify:** `grep "python-json-logger" skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md` → all matches show `>=4.0`, none show `<4.0`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep \"python-json-logger\" skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All four occurrences show >=4.0", "No <4.0 remains in either file"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Version Bump and CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bump plugin version from `2.7.0` to `2.8.0` and record all Round 8 changes in `CHANGELOG.md`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- Modify: `CHANGELOG.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `plugin.json` version is `"2.8.0"`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has `[2.8.0]` entry dated 2026-05-07

**Verify:** `grep '"version"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json && grep '\[2.8.0\]' CHANGELOG.md` → both match

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude-plugin/plugin.json", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep '\"version\"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json && grep '\\[2.8.0\\]' CHANGELOG.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plugin.json version is 2.8.0", "CHANGELOG has [2.8.0] entry dated 2026-05-07"]}
```
